description: Content showcasing multi-generational or large family groups dining together in restaurants or homes, emphasizing togetherness and shared meals as a core family value.
structural_recipe: Post overhead or wide-angle shots of a full table with 4+ family members sharing a meal. Include multiple dishes, warm lighting, and family members actively engaged (talking, laughing, serving each other). Use captions emphasizing family bonding, gratitude, or cultural food traditions. Tag location and relevant restaurant/food accounts. Post during typical Saudi meal times (lunch 1-3pm, dinner 8-10pm).
why_it_works: Family and togetherness are central to Saudi culture and Islamic values. Displaying multi-generational dining reinforces social bonds and appeals to viewers' aspirations for strong family connections. Restaurants benefit from positioning themselves as venues for meaningful family moments, not just food consumption.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure gender-appropriate mixing if dining publicly; respect segregated or mixed dining norms
Avoid alcohol or non-Halal items in frame
Verify family composition aligns with cultural expectations (parents, children, extended family preferred)
cultural_constraints: Content must reflect Halal-compliant dining practices
Family composition should appear culturally conservative
Modesty standards apply to all individuals in frame
